label: Pauper Mono Red Madness
desc: Real Pauper deck: Kessig Flamebreather + Madness discard-burn (MisterTwin, 1st Pauper Challenge 2026-03-08)

cards.name: Kessig Flamebreather
cards.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

cards.name: Guttersnipe
cards.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 2 damage to each opponent.

cards.name: Voldaren Epicure
cards.text: When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to each opponent. Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

cards.name: Sneaky Snacker
cards.text:
Flying
When you draw your third card in a turn, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

cards.name: Lightning Bolt
cards.text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.

cards.name: Lava Dart
cards.text:
Lava Dart deals 1 damage to any target.
Flashback—Sacrifice a Mountain. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

cards.name: Fiery Temper
cards.text:
Fiery Temper deals 3 damage to any target.
Madness {R} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)

cards.name: Faithless Looting
cards.text:
Draw two cards, then discard two cards.
Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

cards.name: Fireblast
cards.text:
You may sacrifice two Mountains rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Fireblast deals 4 damage to any target.

cards.name: Grab the Prize
cards.text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards. If the discarded card wasn't a land card, Grab the Prize deals 2 damage to each opponent.

cards.name: Highway Robbery
cards.text:
You may discard a card or sacrifice a land. If you do, draw two cards.
Plot {1}{R} (You may pay {1}{R} and exile this card from your hand. Cast it as a sorcery on a later turn without paying its mana cost. Plot only as a sorcery.)
